hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_title: My Team and the Hospital -- People & Places
lesson.menu_desc: Describe the places of the hospital with there is / there are -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- My Team and the Hospital: People & Places
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 3 -- People & Places

listenings.text: Good morning, and welcome to Morumbi Hospital. The reception is on the first floor, next to the main door. There are two elevators on your right. The cardiology department is on the third floor. There are many rooms for the patients on the fourth floor. For information, please go to the reception. Thank you, and have a good day.

Hi Graziele, this is a quick message about the building. My office is on the second floor, room two ten. There is a small kitchen next to my room. The elevator is near the reception. There are not many people on this floor today, so it is quiet. Come and find me when you arrive. See you soon.

extra_audio.text: Graziele shows Dr. Carter the hospital. She starts at the reception on the first floor. She points to the two elevators near the door. She shows the rooms for the patients. They go up to the cardiology department on the third floor.
